# OpenAI Agents SDK

Track OpenAI agent runtime patterns relevant to sandboxed tool execution.

## What To Cover

- Function tools
- Hosted tools
- Handoffs
- Tracing
- Streaming
- Guardrails
- Tool error handling
- Local versus deployed execution

## Cookbook Examples

- `examples/openai-agents-sdk/http-tool-sandbox`

## Checklist

- [ ] Minimal tool declaration
- [ ] HTTP sandbox adapter
- [ ] Structured tool result example
- [ ] Structured error example
- [ ] Timeout behavior
- [ ] Trace correlation
- [ ] Streaming behavior
- [ ] Session/state notes
